name: openjkdf2.zip
items: Star Wars Jedi Knight - Dark Forces II.sh
items_opt: Star Wars Jedi Knight - Mysteries of the Sith.sh

attr.title: Star Wars Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II
attr.desc: The 1997 LucasArts FPS that launched Kyle Katarn into the Jedi Knight saga. Native OpenJKDF2 engine port for ARM handhelds with GLES. Requires original game files from GOG or Steam.
attr.desc_md: The 1997 LucasArts FPS that launched Kyle Katarn into the Jedi Knight saga. Native OpenJKDF2 engine port for ARM handhelds with GLES. Requires original game files from GOG or Steam.
attr.inst: Copy JKDF2 files to openjkdf2/jk1/ from GOG or Steam as-is (Episode/, Resource/, etc.). Optional MOTS to openjkdf2/mots/. Use the MOTS launcher or switch in-game via Expansions & Mods.
